title: Russian Pilaf
description: A flavorful and crunchy pilaf dish with a hint of Russian spices.

ingredients.name: seeds
ingredients.notes: a mix of sunflower and pumpkin seeds

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion powder and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the pilaf mix and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the mixed seeds, salt, pepper, onion powder, and garlic powder.
Stir well and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in chopped fresh dill.
